Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-02 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's ranking at position #1 with an exceptional score of 95.4, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1,586.64% over 10 years and 526.47% over 5 years, while maintaining a "strong_buy" signal with clean momentum. The stock's relative performance is equally striking, outpacing SPY by 1,364.66% over the decade and beating QQQ by 1,143.25%, though this outsized performance comes with elevated volatility (vol_ratio of 1.438). MPC ranks second with more modest but still solid momentum credentials—63.03% 1-year return and a 5.31x ratio between 5-year and 1-year gains—yet its relative performance versus SPY (326.38% over 10 years) and especially QQQ (104.97% over 10 years) lags significantly behind LINC, suggesting sector-specific strength rather than broad market leadership. Both leaders maintain all four moving average signals (SMA30/50/100/200), indicating sustained uptrends, though LINC's structural dominance and "clean" momentum flag suggest a more compelling long-term position than MPC's mixed 6-month pullback (0.52 ratio from 3m
